sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72888" key="o)lagmeu/ein" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλαγμεύειν·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀλὰς βάλλειν,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλαεῖ·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐνοχλεῖ, καὶ</foreign> </entryFree>
